description.ko: 사이버펑크 대도시를 수직으로 탐험하며 미래 도시 협곡의 낭만적이고 어두운 분위기를 포착합니다.
description.en: A vertical exploration of a cyberpunk metropolis, capturing the romantic and dark atmosphere of a futuristic urban canyon.

prompt: A cinematic bird's-eye view looking down a rain-drenched megacity canyon in NEON-V. Towering #1A0033 skyscrapers are connected by massive 3D holographic bridges pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy artificial rain creates distorted reflections on the wet metallic surfaces below. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution.
